title: Prove it on odyssey — the FIRST remote Linux-VM demo deploy over Tailscale, driven end-to-end for BOTH vantages (employee maya-thriving -> /profile; manager dan-manager -> /enterprise/workforce) from a DIFFERENT tailnet machine on a trusted Let's Encrypt cert (verify=0, no CA install), 0 console errors, 0 localhost/prod ejects, assets rendering, reproducibly on a cold reset-to-seed. The iterative acceptance closer of v2.2 'panorama'. Plus the propagation close-gate: every deployment finding landed in tools (rext) + KB + skills.
kind: the v2.2 'panorama' M215 (live cross-machine acceptance gate) milestone. Live shared-infra work on the odyssey 'billion' VM (Ubuntu 24.04). rosetta deliverable = docs+plan (the NEW corpus/ops/demo/tailscale-serve.md full remote-Linux-VM runbook + setup_guide/rosetta_demo/clerkenstein updates + demo-up/stack-secrets/dev-up skill updates + iter-01/findings.md + propagation-checklist.md). rext deliverable = the host-prereq + F3/F4/F6/F12 fix set, FROZEN at annotated tag panorama-m215 @ 00ba6b6 (rext re-tag + .agentspace/rext.tag bump reserved for /developer-kit:close-release). ZERO platform-repo edits.

gate.target: From a fresh box, /demo-up N --public-host <magicdns> (opt-in) brings up a demo reachable at https://<magicdns>; a teammate on a DIFFERENT tailnet machine completes a full employee AND manager hero journey with 0 localhost/prod ejects, 0 CORS blocks, 0 cert-untrusted warnings, 0 mixed-content, assets rendering, reproducibly on a cold reset-to-seed; the UNSET knob (default) is byte-identical to today.
gate.achieved: MET (core). Both vantages driven live from a remote Mac over Tailscale (maya-thriving -> /profile with the M41 ProfileSeeder depth; dan-manager -> /enterprise/workforce 'Workforce Intelligence' with real seeded structural data), ignoreHTTPSErrors:false (genuinely trusted LE cert, verify=0, no CA install), 0 console errors, 0 functional request failures, 0 localhost/prod ejects, assets rendering. A clean cold reset-to-seed one-shot --public-host bring-up with the fixed tooling (14 containers, tailscale serve fronting 5 ports, seed 12,245 rows / 541 users / 9-hero roster, /api/health 200, login-ready from the Mac). Unset knob byte-identical (macOS/dev path proven byte-identical by guards + tests).
gate.distance: gate met (core); 4 non-blocking documented residuals routed forward (F5/F9/F11/F13)

iters.shape: direct-drive (live shared-infra work, not background sub-agents) — D-STRAT-1
iters.record: iter-01/findings.md (tik-1 trimmed de-risk -> tik-2 remote employee login -> manager vantage -> cold reset-to-seed capstone), findings F1-F13

tests.language: rext bash + python (pytest); M215 touched ZERO Go and ZERO TS
tests.counts_source: authoritative — independently re-run at close via python3.12 -m pytest (pytest 9.0.3; box-default python3 is 3.14 with no pytest). demo-stack '424 passed in 107.75s'; stack-injection '147 passed, 8 skipped in 3.93s'. Matches the propagation-checklist + iter-01 claims exactly.
tests.python_delta: demo-stack 383 (M214) -> 424 (M215) = +41 net-new funcs (+25 host-prereqs pre-flight/ssh-agent/data-dirs/atlas-fail-loud [tests/test_host_prereqs_m215.py = 41/41 incl. the ~400-tag F3 fixture regression] + +16 F12 tailscale-serve teardown/up-path reset). stack-injection unchanged at 155 (147p/8s) — the M215 rext work is demo-stack + gen_tailscale_serve.py --reset (exercised via demo-stack).
tests.close_added_test: none — the close is rosetta docs+plan only; rext is frozen at panorama-m215 (a rosetta-only close must not re-tag). It surfaced no defect requiring a new regression test. ADV-1 (F12 up-path pre-reset placement) is non-blocking (teardown reset is the primary mechanism; up-path is defensive-only; manual `tailscale serve reset` unblock documented) and routes a one-line reconciliation to the rext close-release re-tag.
tests.shellcheck: clean (shellcheck 0.11.0 at -S style on the three touched shell files: migrate-demo.sh, up-injected.sh, rosetta-demo — zero findings each).
tests.flake_gate: n/a for the rosetta close (docs+plan; no rosetta-side test suite). The rext suite is frozen at panorama-m215 and was hardened+flake-gated at its own build/harden (per the propagation-checklist: 424 demo-stack / 147p8s stack-injection, macOS/dev path byte-identical). Re-run once at close = identical counts.

Codified in the NEW corpus/ops/demo/tailscale-serve.md.

review.adversarial: 1 scenario recorded (ADV-1 in decisions.md): the F12 up-path defensive pre-reset sits after compose-up, so it can't prevent a backend-bind conflict from a leftover serve listener; the teardown reset (primary) covers the normal /demo-down->/demo-up cycle, the by-hand-teardown case is covered by the documented manual `tailscale serve reset`, the block is non-fatal + localhost no-op. 0 blocking defects; rext frozen -> a one-line reconciliation routes to the close-release rext re-tag.
review.deferral_audit: GREEN — m215-prove-on-odyssey/audit-deferrals/deferral-audit-2026-07-11.md — 11 records: 3 inherited->M215 all LANDED Fate-1/resolved; 3 inherited->close-release (D-CLOSE-1/-2/-3, correct destination, runs next); 4 new M215->standing-backlog Fate-2 (F5/F9/F11/F13); 1 re-reviewed evidence-decided non-deferral (D-URLS-1). 0 repeat, 0 chronic, 0 aged-out, 0 escape-hatch, 0 blocking.

propagation_close_gate: SATISFIED (user directive 2026-07-11) — every deployment finding (F1/F2/F4/F6/F8/F9/F12) is in tools (rext) + KB + skills; a fresh reader can stand up a remote demo on a new Linux VM unaided from corpus/ops/demo/tailscale-serve.md alone (verified). notes: M215 is the FINAL v2.2 milestone -> /developer-kit:close-release runs next (rolls the rext v2.2 tag, bumps .agentspace/rext.tag from v2.1, reconciles D-CLOSE-1/-2/-3 + the ADV-1 F12 note, merges release/02.20-panorama -> main + tags v2.2).
